productDisplayName: Maxima Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with copper and white coloured hands  Strap style: Brown synthetic leather strap with faux crocodile skin pattern and a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark, a screw to reset time and date aperture at the 3 hour mark, three dials on face, buttons for stopwatch Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
